panels.name: Discharge Labs HD57
panels.preview: WBC 6.4, Hgb 10.5, Plt 256. Cr 1.3 (baseline). LFTs normal. Alb 3.2 (low normal). INR 1.0.

panels.name: Step-Down Labs HD16 — DVT Diagnosis Day
panels.preview: Cr 1.4 (near baseline). Hgb 8.6. INR 1.1, aPTT 32, D-dimer 8.4 (elevated, consistent with new VTE). Coags appropriate for therapeutic anticoag initiation.

panels.name: MICU AM Labs HD8 — Improving
panels.preview: WBC 9.2 (normalized from peak 19.8). Cr 1.6 (down from peak 2.6). Lactate 1.4 (cleared). Lipase 240 (down from peak 1124). P/F 168 (improving from 124, moderate ARDS).

panels.name: TB Rule-Out Workup HD5 (results final 2/22)
panels.preview: 3 sputum AFB smears NEGATIVE. Sputum Xpert MTB/RIF NOT DETECTED. Sputum AFB cultures (final 8-week read 4/16) all NEGATIVE. Biliary fluid culture grew E. coli, pansensitive.

panels.name: MICU AM Labs HD2 — Worsening Sepsis
panels.preview: WBC 19.8 (up). Cr 2.1 (up). T-bili 4.1 (up). Lipase 1124. Lactate 3.8. Biliary fluid Gram-negative rods. P/F 124 (ARDS criteria). Patient on low-dose norepi.

panels.name: ED Admission Labs — Biliary Pancreatitis
panels.preview: WBC 17.3, Hgb 10.2, Plt 345. Cr 1.8 (from baseline 1.3, AKI on CKD). T-bili 3.2 with direct fraction. ALP 102. Lipase 603. Lactate 3.2. Procalcitonin 4.8.

panels.name: Annual PCP Labs (pre-admission)
panels.preview: Most recent baseline labs. WBC 5.8, Hgb 11.6 (chronic mild anemia), Plt 232. Cr 1.3 (CKD III stable, eGFR 47). LDL 78 at goal. HbA1c 5.8 pre-diabetic stable. Vit D 28 (low).

panels.name: Annual PCP Labs (CKD discovery)
panels.preview: CKD stage 3a newly identified (Cr 1.2 from prior 0.9-1.0, eGFR 47, microalbuminuria ACR 62). Hgb 11.8 (early CKD anemia). LDL 82 at goal.

panels.name: LTBI Workup (Pulm/ID Consult)
panels.preview: Positive PPD 14 mm + positive QuantiFERON-TB Gold. HIV/Hep B/Hep C all negative. Baseline LFTs normal. 3 sputum AFB smears + 8-week cultures all negative. Latent TB infection confirmed; INH offered, patient declined.

panels.name: Initial PCP Labs (Establishing Care)
panels.preview: Baseline (age 55). Cr 0.9 (eGFR 65). Borderline lipids (LDL 148). HbA1c 5.7 (pre-diabetic). Normal LFTs, CBC, UA.
